title: centaurea orbelica
intro: Centaurea orbelica, also known as Orbelica or Balkan cornflower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Centaurea orbelica include its ability to support digestive health, reduce symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), and boost the immune system. Centaurea orbelica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
